markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Bobby Witt Jr. records 4+ hits in the Kansas City vs New York M professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 8, 2026 at 7:10 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Bobby Witt Jr. is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Bobby Witt Jr. starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Bobby Witt Jr. is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Bobby Witt Jr. is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.
markets.title: Bobby Witt Jr.: 4+ hits?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Miko Lapalme wins the Lapalme vs Kirchheimer professional tennis match in the 2026 M25 Laval Round of 32 after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Lapalme vs Kirchheimer professional tennis match in the 2026 M25 Laval Round of 32 after a ball has been played. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), all markets will resolve to $0.50. If a player withdraws or forfeits after a match has started, that player will resolve to No. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks).
markets.title: Will Miko Lapalme win the Lapalme vs Kirchheimer: M25 Laval Round of 32 match?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.

markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Lapalme vs Kirchheimer professional tennis match in the 2026 M25 Laval Round of 32 after a ball has been played. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), all markets will resolve to $0.50. If a player withdraws or forfeits after a match has started, that player will resolve to No. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks).
markets.title: Will Strong Kirchheimer win the Lapalme vs Kirchheimer: M25 Laval Round of 32 match?
